lib.utils¶

Classes

LoadModel()

SpecialCaseFunctions()

class lib.utils.LoadModel[source]¶

Bases: object

static load_and_return_model(model_path, model, device)[source]¶

Load the state dictionary into the model class and prepare it for evaluation.

Return type:

torch.nn.Module

static make_model_instance(model_arch)[source]¶

Create an instance of the model class specified by the model architecture.

Return type:

None

class lib.utils.SpecialCaseFunctions[source]¶

Bases: object

static incident_photon_wavelength_to_energy(wavelength)[source]¶

This function takes in the wavelength of an incident photon and returns the energy of the photon on eV (electron volts).

Parameters:

wavelength (float) – The wavelength of the incident photon in Angstroms.

Returns:

photon energy (float)L

Return type:

float
